caption: A video shows a political event featuring Narendra Modi speaking. He is wearing a white kurta and a multi-colored saffron, green, and white scarf. Behind him and to his side, a crowd of people is visible, some wearing saffron-colored caps and scarves. The scene is framed by an orange graphic overlay. At the top, white text reads "भारतीय जनता पार्टी स्थापना दिवस" alongside the lotus logo of the Bharatiya Janata Party. The words "प्रजानमंत्री" and "दिल्ली" appear in smaller text on the left and right sides of the top banner. Below the video window, text reads "लाइव देखें" followed by social media icons and the handle "/BJP4India", and a website URL "www.bjp.org/bjplive". Across the frames, Narendra Modi is seen gesturing with his hands while speaking, while the crowd in the background remains relatively stationary, watching him.
